Prof. Erdal Panayırcı Reappointed as a Visiting Research Collaborator at Princeton University

Prof. Erdal Panayırcı reappointed as a

Visiting Research Collaborator

in Professor Poor’s research group in the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering at Princeton University, beginning June 1, 2023, through May 31, 2024.

Prof. Panayırcı has been in this position for a long time, working as a scientific collaborator with Vincent H. Poor at Princeton University, who is the world’s leading scientist in

Information and Communication Technologies

. In particular, they made significant contributions to science and technology with their international research and projects on

next-generation communication systems,

including

and

physical layer security.

.
